meta.title: Goality TMC — Play. Grow. Win.
meta.description: Football tournament management platform — registration, logistics, accommodation, and payments in one place.

auth.forgotSubtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link
auth.forgotSentHint: If an account with this email exists, you will receive a password reset link shortly. The link is valid for 1 hour.
auth.forgotError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.resetDoneHint: You can now log in with your new password.
auth.resetError: Invalid or expired reset link. Please request a new one.
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters

auth.loginHeroQuote: Setup took 20 minutes. Clubs loved the self-service registration.
auth.findYourClubSubtitle: Start typing your club name to sign in
auth.skipToLogin: I know my credentials — go to login

people.gdprConsent: I certify that I have permission to submit this personal information to the tournament

people.medicalHint: Medications, conditions, or other medical information

players.title: Players

players.fillRowToAdd: Fill in first and last name to add a player

staff.title: Staff
staff.description: Register coaches, physios, and other team staff
staff.noResponsibleWarning: You have not assigned a responsible person who will be with the team during the tournament

accompanying.title: Accompanying Persons
accompanying.description: Register parents, supporters, or other accompanying persons

orders.title: Orders
orders.description: Here you place your orders and can see your costs. When updating, fill in the total number that the order is valid for.
orders.hotelPlayersHint: Number of players staying at the hotel
orders.hotelLeadersHint: Number of leaders staying at the hotel

booking.title: Booking
booking.description: Here you place your orders and can see your costs. When updating, fill in the total number that the order is valid for.
booking.medicalSummaryDescription: Overview of allergies, dietary requirements and medical notes for all team members
booking.noMedicalInfo: No medical or dietary information registered
booking.healthDisclaimer: Team representatives are fully responsible for the health, safety and well-being of all participants in their group. The organisers bear no responsibility for personal health, personal belongings or team property.
booking.pricingNotAssigned: Pricing has not been assigned yet
booking.pricingNotAssignedDesc: The organizer will set up your pricing shortly. Please check back later.
booking.mealsPersonsHint: How many people need meals from the included package

packageSummary.title: My Package
packageSummary.description: Services included in your package with calculated costs based on your team size
packageSummary.notAvailableDesc: The organizer hasn't assigned and published your package yet. Check back later.

economy.title: Economy
economy.description: Below you can see the team's costs and when they must be paid
economy.paymentsDeadline: Payments must be received by Kings Cup at the latest:

travel.title: Travel Details
travel.description: Let us know your travel details so we can arrange hotel check-in and transfer.

jersey.title: Club badge
jersey.description: Upload your club's emblem. This will be published in the match schedule.
jersey.hint: The image should only show the club's logo, with a transparent background, in dimensions 500×500px and in PNG format.

inbox.title: Inbox
inbox.description: Messages from the organizer and your questions

profile.title: Profile
profile.deleteWarning: This will send a deletion request to the organizer. Your data will be removed after confirmation.
profile.deletionSent: Deletion request sent. We will contact you shortly.
profile.inviteManagerDesc: Share this link with a coach or manager — they will create their own account and see only this team.
profile.inviteLinkExpiry: The link is valid for 7 days.

hasPlayers.hint: Add at least one player. Players are registered on the Players page.

hasStaff.hint: Add at least one staff member — coach, physio, or team manager.

hasResponsible.hint: Assign a staff member as responsible on site. Open the staff page and check the "Responsible on site" checkbox.

hasTravel.hint: Fill in your arrival and departure details so we can arrange hotel check-in and transfer.

hasOrders.hint: Answer the accommodation question above — confirm whether your team needs a hotel or not.

accom.questSubtitle: Urgent! We need to know the number of places to book the hotel.
accom.formSubtitle: Enter the number of places and dates
accom.confirmDeclineQuestion: Are you sure you don't need accommodation?

club.title: Club Information
club.description: Tell us about your club. One club can register multiple teams.
club.name: Club name

teams.title: Register Teams
teams.description: Add all teams you want to register. Each team plays in one age class.

contact.title: Contact Person
contact.description: The main contact will receive all communications. This will also be your login.

review.title: Review & Submit
review.description: Please verify your information before submitting.

errors.teamNameRequired: All teams must have a name
errors.ageClassRequired: Please select an age class for each team
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
errors.emailAlreadyExists: An account with this email already exists. Please log in instead.

club.title: Club Settings
club.managersDesc: People who can log in and manage a specific team.
club.inviteStep1: Choose the team and click "Generate Invite Link".
club.inviteStep2: Copy the link and send it to the coach or manager.
club.inviteStep3: They open the link, create their own account (name, email, password).
club.inviteStep4: After sign-in they see only their team — no access to other teams.
club.inviteNote: The link expires in 7 days. You can generate a new one at any time.

flexServices.pageDescription: Create service types and configure them in packages with pricing

packages.title: Packages
packages.cannotDelete: Cannot delete package with assigned teams

orgAdmin.heroDesc: Public tournament page, online club registration, team management — all included, no limits
orgAdmin.step1Desc: Set name, year and open registration
orgAdmin.step2Desc: Share the link — clubs join from the catalog
orgAdmin.step3Desc: Teams, schedule, payments — all in one place
orgAdmin.allInOneDesc: Accept registrations, communicate with clubs, track payments — no spreadsheets or messengers needed
orgAdmin.premiumDesc: Schedule, results, payment module and brand sponsorships

landing.heroSubtitle: The all-in-one platform for youth football tournaments
landing.heroDesc: From club registration to hotel assignments, payments and schedules — Goality TMC handles everything so organizers can focus on the game, not the spreadsheets.
landing.productDesc: Goality TMC is a cloud-based tournament management system designed specifically for youth football. We eliminate manual work, reduce errors, and create a seamless experience for organizers, clubs, and players.
landing.vp1Desc: Set up your tournament, add age classes, configure services and open registration — all in under 10 minutes. No IT knowledge required.
landing.vp2Desc: Support for multiple languages (EN / RU / ET), currencies, and international club registration. Built for European tournaments.
landing.vp3Desc: Role-based access control — super admin, org admin, club managers. Your data is safe, your workflow is structured.
landing.orgDesc: Stop juggling spreadsheets, WhatsApp groups, and email threads. Goality TMC gives you a single command center to manage everything — before, during, and after the tournament.
landing.f1Desc: Self-service portal for clubs to register, add teams, upload badges and set login credentials.
landing.f2Desc: Bundle accommodation, meals, transfers and extras into packages with per-team pricing.
landing.f3Desc: Assign rooms to teams, track occupancy, manage check-in/check-out and special requests.
landing.f4Desc: Organize bus routes, assign teams to vehicles, track arrival and departure logistics.
landing.f5Desc: Monitor invoices, record payments, calculate balances and export financial summaries.
landing.f6Desc: Send announcements, updates and tournament info directly to all clubs or specific teams.
landing.f7Desc: Clubs add players, staff and accompanying persons with full profile and medical info.
landing.f8Desc: Match schedule, results and tournament protocols — all in one place for everyone.
landing.f9Desc: Real-time overview of registrations, payments, accommodation — everything in one screen.
landing.f10Desc: Full support for English, Russian and Estonian — automatically adapts to the user's locale.
landing.f11Desc: Super admin, org admin, club manager — each with the exact permissions they need.
landing.f12Desc: Manage multiple tournaments under one organization with shared settings and branding.
landing.p1After: ✅ Digital registration — clubs apply online in 3 minutes
landing.p2After: ✅ Visual room dashboard with drag-and-drop assignment
landing.p3After: ✅ Automatic package pricing, invoices and payment tracking
landing.p4After: ✅ Built-in club inbox with read receipts
landing.p5Before: ❌ No visibility on who paid and how much
landing.p5After: ✅ Real-time financial dashboard with balance per team
landing.p6Before: ❌ Players list collected via PDF forms
landing.p6After: ✅ Clubs manage own rosters — players, staff, medical data
landing.trustQuote: Finally a system that understands what tournament organizers actually need. Setup took 20 minutes, clubs loved the self-service registration.
landing.ctaDesc: Join organizers across Europe who trust Goality TMC to deliver flawless tournaments. Free to start, scales with your event.
landing.ctaDisclaimer: No credit card required · Setup in 10 minutes · Cancel anytime

catalog.subtitle: Find and register for upcoming tournaments

catalog.checkBack: Check back soon — new tournaments are added regularly

clubRegister.heroSubtitle: Join the tournament in a few simple steps.
clubRegister.heroQuote: Simple and fast. We registered in 5 minutes.
clubRegister.findSubtitle: Check if your club is already in our system before creating a new one — this prevents duplicates.
clubRegister.findWarning: Multiple teams from the same club must register under one shared club account, not as separate clubs.
clubRegister.findHint: Type at least 2 characters to search
clubRegister.findNoResults: No clubs found with that name
clubRegister.createNewBtn: My club is not in the list — create new
clubRegister.foundMessage: This club is already in our system. If you're from this club, please sign in to the club portal or contact your administrator to add your team.
